value: I understand your frustration—having a plane ready but crew unavailable is definitely a logistics issue that shouldn't happen. While we appreciate that our response has been helpful, crew scheduling challenges with our partner airlines are ultimately outside our direct control. That said, we take these operational gaps seriously as they directly impact your experience. If you'd like us to escalate this specific incident to Skywest management, please share your confirmation number and flight details, and we'll make sure they're aware of the problem.
